who: in-house legal teams at law firms processing 5–15 regulatory filings/month
offer: For in-house legal teams at law firms processing 5–15 regulatory filings/month, manual data collection causes late submissions. We automate compliance reporting instead of manual data collection and formatting.
problem: Difficulty in collecting and formatting data for timely regulatory filings.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for legal teams
Indie Hackers discussions on compliance tools
DM outreach to legal teams with demo video
Engage in community forums for legal tech
try_it: Let users try data collection templates and deadline reminders on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a simple landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the process
Provide early-access onboarding for initial users
Share weekly updates in relevant online communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as reusable templates
Set default reminder schedules for users
Allow CSV import for existing data
